title: Horror Island
description: Horror Island is a Minecraft 1.12.2 Modpack that focuses on creating a terrifying gameplay experience. It utilizes many horror themed mods to add tons of ghoulish enemies to the game such as: parasites, ghosts, phantoms, mutants, weeping angles & more!
body:
# Winter Zombies by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
Horror Island is a Minecraft 1.12.2 Modpack that focuses on creating a terrifying gameplay experience. It utilizes many horror themed mods to add tons of ghoulish enemies to the game such as: parasites, ghosts, phantoms, mutants, weeping angles & much more. Many of these creatures are deadly, so be warned - although things may appear safe, they aren't. You're always being watched, and whatever you do - don't venture out into the darkness.

![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice For the Shaders / Resource Packs feature you will have to manually install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for 1.12.2
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Socials


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
